title: Smith Bros Cobblemon
description:
Cobblemon and friends, on 1.20.1 w/ Forge. 
Modpack for a private server
body:
**This modpack for a private server.  While you are free to use it as you wish, no support will be provided.**

## Smith Bros Cobblemon

This modpack features a combination of Pokemon-inspired features (enabled by [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/en) and its addons), and traditional "tech mods".

### Pokemon Features
- Starters from every Pokemon generation
- Wild pokemon to battle or capture (with Pokemon Showdown rules and mechanics)
- Pokemon help defend you from monsters ([Fight or Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight))
- Aggressive pokemon ([Fight or Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight))
- Pokemon breeding ([Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding))
- Pokemon riding ([CobblemonRider](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemonrider))
- Ambient music and battle music

### Tech Mods
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) for clockwork contraptions and automated pokeball factories
- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) for traditional power and ore refining systems.  Scales all the way up to nuclear reactors!
- [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) to let you tame _more_ creatures to help around your base, and craft frankly overpowered spells.

In-game guides are available for all three tech mods, and for Cobblemon.

There are also several world generation, performance, and compatibility/interoperability mods included.
